name: Sweet and Sour Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon dried chili flakes, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor, puree the nectarines, plums, preserves, mustard, chili flakes or jalapeno pepper, salt, pepper, and lemon juice. Transfer the mixture to a large bowl.
2. Add the shrimp to the bowl and toss to coat evenly. Serve cold as an appetizer or hot over rice as an entree.
Makes 4 servings. Preparation time: About 20 minutes. Cooking time: About 5 minutes.
Per serving: Approximately 234 calories, 25 grams protein, 32 grams carbohydrates, 4 grams fat, 13% of calories from fat, 173 milligrams cholesterol, 550 milligrams sodium, and 4 grams fiber.
Busted by Gail Shermeyer
